title: BeaconEvent
description: QoE event batch posted by the player beacon SDK to POST /ingest/beacon. Field naming is CMCD-aligned where applicable (PRD F3). SKELETON: enums and field sets to be finalized by INT-01 before Phase 2 implementation.

session_id.description: Viewer session UUID, generated client-side, used for session stitching

meta.description: Customer-supplied metadata set at init (e.g. tenant tag for F6 billing mapping)

data.description: Type-specific payload (startup_ms, error_code, bitrate_kbps, watch_time_s, ...) — finalized per event type by INT-01
